summary: Iteration 231: Phase 4 Reports Hub Refinement - All 23 backend tests passed (100%). All frontend UI flows verified successfully. Three new report pages (Business Health, Financial Reports, Sales Reports) render correctly with KPIs, charts, tabs, date filters, and PDF/CSV export buttons. Sidebar role filtering works correctly: Admin sees all 6 report links, Sales Manager sees 3 (Business Health, Sales Reports, Customer Experience), Finance Manager sees 3 (Business Health, Financial Reports, Risk & Governance). Regression tests confirm all three dashboards (Admin, Sales Manager, Finance Manager) still work correctly.

tests: GET /api/admin/reports/business-health?days=180 returns 200
Response has kpis object with total_revenue, margin_pct, avg_rating, total_orders, pending_payments, discount_risk_score
Response has charts with revenue_trend, margin_trend, rating_trend, discount_risk_trend arrays
Response has alerts array
Days filter works for 30/90/180/365
GET /api/admin/reports/financial?days=180 returns 200
Response has kpis object with total_revenue, revenue_month, collected, outstanding_invoices, commission_total, margin_pct
Response has charts with revenue_trend, cash_flow_trend, margin_trend, commission_trend arrays
Response has top_customers array
Response has commission_by_rep array
Response has payment_breakdown array
GET /api/admin/reports/sales?days=180 returns 200
Response has kpis object with total_deals, total_revenue, avg_rating, conversion_rate, active_reps, pipeline_value
Response has team_table array
Response has leaderboard array
Response has charts with conversion_trend, deals_trend arrays
Sales Manager can access Business Health API
Sales Manager can access Sales Reports API
Finance Manager can access Business Health API
Finance Manager can access Financial Reports API
Admin dashboard KPIs endpoint still works
Admin sees 'Control Center' hero
Sales Manager team KPIs endpoint still works
Sales Manager sees 'Team Command Center' hero
Finance Manager finance KPIs endpoint still works
Finance Manager sees 'Financial Control Center' hero

seed_data_creation: None - using existing seed data from previous phases
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 Reports Hub Refinement fully implemented and tested. Three new report pages added: (1) Business Health at /admin/reports/business-health - executive overview with 6 KPIs, 4 charts (Revenue, Margin, Rating, Discount Risk trends), and Active Alerts section; (2) Financial Reports at /admin/reports/financial - 4 tabs (Revenue, Cash Flow, Margin, Commission) with 6 KPIs, charts, top customers, commission by rep table; (3) Sales Reports at /admin/reports/sales - 3 tabs (Performance, Conversion, Leaderboard) with 6 KPIs, team performance table, deals trend chart, leaderboard. All pages have date range filter (30/90/180/365 days) and PDF+CSV export buttons. Sidebar navigation uses child-level roles arrays: Admin sees all 6 report links, Sales Manager sees Business Health/Sales Reports/Customer Experience, Finance Manager sees Business Health/Financial Reports/Risk & Governance. Customer Experience links to existing /admin/sales-ratings, Risk & Governance links to existing /admin/discount-analytics.
